errors.circleInputsNumbers: The x, y, and radius inputs must be numbers
errors.colorNamedOrHex: Color must be a named color ("orange", "blue", "white", etc) specified in the instructions, or a hex color starting with #
errors.colorNotAllowed: Color should not be specified for this exercise
errors.ellipseInputsNumbers: The x, y, rx, and ry inputs must be numbers
errors.lineInputsNumbers: The x1, y1, x2, and y2 inputs must be numbers
errors.rectInputsNumbers: The x, y, width, and height inputs must be numbers
errors.triangleInputsNumbers: The x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, and y3 inputs must be numbers
